text: Here in this modern, meticulously constructed space, I am enveloped by a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The glass and lights impart a cool sterility, yet the visible signs—fire extinguishers, emergency exits—remind me of the ever-present fragility underlying order. The exhibition wall in the next image, focused on research and development, provokes contemplation on the relationship between humans and machines. I feel a gentle surge of wonder mixed with a longing to understand the deeper consequences of our ongoing collaboration with technology.
